C:\Files\cmake-3.23.2-windows-x86_64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\gb_emu.dir/objects.a
C:\Files\Qt\Tools\mingw810_64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\gb_emu.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\gb_emu.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\Files\Qt\Tools\mingw810_64\bin\g++.exe -Os -DNDEBUG -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\gb_emu.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o gb_emu.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libgb_emu.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\gb_emu.dir\linklibs.rsp
